name: Summary of a continuous variable
label: Continuous summary (N, mean, SD, median, Q1, Q3, min, max)
description: Descriptive statistics of a continuous analysis variable per group. Verified against Common_Safety_Displays Mth02_ContVar_Summ_ByGrp; current cards API (ard_summary, by_listc). Fixes the legacy sheet which used the deprecated ard_continuous + by_stmt (the latter stamps no group metadata).

parameters.name: byvarshere
parameters.label: by vars (list)
parameters.description: Grouping variables as a quoted, comma-separated list
